tasks.label: Commit and push dienchan changes
tasks.command: git add dienchan-firebase.html firebase-config.js .vscode/tasks.json && git commit -m "Enforce admin-only Firebase writes and local fallback for other users" && git push origin master

tasks.label: Commit and push risk fixes
tasks.command: git add dienchan-firebase.html firebase-config.js && git commit -m "Fix admin-only write/Cloudinary paths and improve Firebase user messaging" && git push origin master

tasks.label: Commit and push guide tab update
tasks.command: git add dienchan-firebase.html && git commit -m "Add project usage guide tab and rename technique guide tab" && git push origin master

tasks.label: Commit and push backup feature
tasks.command: git add dienchan-firebase.html && git commit -m "Add backup and restore functionality for project data" && git push origin master

tasks.label: Commit and push changes
tasks.command: git add dienchan-firebase.html && git commit -m "Update search layout and guide-nav button layout" && git push origin master

tasks.label: Commit and push privacy update
tasks.command: git add dienchan-firebase.html && git commit -m "Restrict medical records to creator and add UI note" && git push origin master
